title: Resume
text: Download my Resume as a PDF

title: Resume
text:
Education
Brigham Young University - Idaho | Rexburg, ID Bachelor of Science | November 2024 - May 2028 * Major: Accounting * GPA: 3.86 * Minor: Data Science

title: Resume
text:
Experience
Grocery Clerk | WinCo Foods, Idaho Falls, ID * Promoted within two weeks for strong performance and rapid skill development. * Provided exceptional member-focused customer service to 50+ customers per day. * Received weekly one-on-one mentoring on branch-style operations, leadership, and quality service standards. * Built strong relationships with customers and coworkers to support a positive store environment. * Recorded inventory and rotated products with high attention to detail. * Trained across eight departments, including Grocery, Produce, Meat, Bakery, and Cashier. * Supported high-traffic holiday and weekend operations, helping hundreds of customers complete purchases.
Fryer | Rusty Lantern Diner, Ucon, ID * Memorized 20+ recipes for main dishes and desserts. * Prepared dozens of orders per hour in a fast-paced kitchen with a two-person team. * Filled shifts during short-staffed periods and maintained flexible availability. * Adapted quickly to changing service demands while maintaining exceptional customer service standards. * Executed food preparation, sanitation, and customer service tasks within a four-person team, completing orders in under 12 minutes.

title: Resume
text:
Leadership, Interests, & Skills

Eagle Scout Award: Earned in the final year it was offered by the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.
Service: Built and donated a bookshelf to a Ruth House shelter and supplied nearly 100 books.
Awards: Received the President’s Award for Educational Achievement.
Communication: Demonstrate strong written and verbal communication skills, including active listening.
Interests: Played guitar for over a decade; built an electric guitar from scratch.
Work Ethic: Proven reliability during long shifts and challenging environments, including outdoor winter conditions.
Technical Skills: Proficient with Microsoft Office tools (Word, Excel, Outlook) and basic Data Science workflows.
